media.title: Lakers look to bolster bench by signing veteran guard to multi-year contract
media.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are reportedly signing Collin Sexton to a two-year, $19 million contract in a move to address their bench.

items.title: Sexton on a Room Exception and Mamu for less than the full MLE? Lakers are going to be pretty solid. I don't think good enough to truly contend, but the new ownership group looks like it's already putting its stamp on things.
items.author: Dr. Justin Quinn
items.body_excerpt: Sexton on a Room Exception and Mamu for less than the full MLE? Lakers are going to be pretty solid. I don't think good enough to truly contend, but the new ownership group looks like it's already putting its stamp on things.

items.title: Okorie on his player comp and who his favorites are: "I would probably say a guy like Collin Sexton. The intensity he brings on both sides of the floor, offense and defense. But my favorite players growing up were definitely LeBron James and Kyrie Irving."

items.title: In a tie game with 20 seconds left, Collin Sexton calls for the ball but is waved off demonstrably by Isaiah Collier who ends up getting an 8 second violation. This leads to a HEATED exchange on the bench. "Give me the f***ing ball!"
items.author: Skyfall24K
